title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Goibibo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Goibibo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Goibibo family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Goibibo:
Goibibo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goibibo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
